terms.name: Level
terms.simple: The map — the 3D world players walk through.

terms.name: Actor
terms.simple: Any object in the world: player, gun, light, wall.

terms.name: Blueprint
terms.simple: Visual logic — boxes and wires instead of code.

terms.name: Play
terms.simple: Test the game inside the editor without exporting.

terms.name: Unreal MCP
terms.simple: A bridge so Grok can read and change your editor while you learn.

terms.name: Content Browser
terms.simple: Your project's filing cabinet — all assets and blueprints.
